programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E37 Under Mom's Thumb
programme.desc: A prostitute gets busted on a slow work day. An intoxicated inmate tangles with guards, and an angry woman has cross words for a guard.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Rowdy Redneck
programme.desc: An inmate is subdued for refusing to follow commands. A woman accused of running out on a dinner bill has her jewelry sawed off in jail. After issuing criminal terrorist threats, a man is jailed.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Money Buys Justice
programme.desc: A man under the influence states money will buy his freedom after threatening police with a gun. Individuals arrested for possession blame each other. A man arrested for drunk driving becomes unruly.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Angry Probation
programme.desc: Inmates are subdued after exhibiting unruly behavior. Anger drives emotions as a man accuses officers of racial profiling. An officer uses “verbal judo” to gain the upper hand with combative inmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Mean Marine
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL officers place a hostile former Marine in isolation. In Portland, OR officers take a man into custody for joyriding in a stolen car. In Las Vegas, NV a jailed man is more concerned about the condition of his car rather than the people involved in the accident that was hospitalized.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Las Vegas Motor Mouth
programme.desc: A belligerent man with a grudge is placed in a restraint chair. An intoxicated woman receives a love note from an inmate on worker status.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 Mr. Crisp
programme.desc: A woman is brought into the detention center hogtied. A disruptive teen is sent to a holding cell. Casino valets tip the authorities about an intoxicated woman leaving behind the wheel.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Locked Out
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a disorderly man in the detention center is sent to the padded room. A Sarasota, FL man hurls insults at officers while in custody. In Portland, OR a drunk and destructive young man is placed in the drunk-tank. In Las Vegas, NV a woman tries to lie about the reasons behind her detention.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E36 Landlord Attack
programme.desc: An inmate swallows a stash of drugs and then comes down with a case of the munchies. A 72-year-old offers an unusual excuse for dealing drugs to teens at a mall, and a woman charged with assaulting a landlord fakes being sick to get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Pigeonholed
programme.desc: A man attacks a medical officer and officers rush to intervene. After destroying a tree and unleashing pigeons, a woman is arrested. Unease is caused by a man’s menacing glare during his booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E21 Mad About Everybody
programme.desc: An inmate's flirting calms a jailhouse fight. An inebriated man tries to avoid his eighth DUI by claiming his car was stolen, and a disagreement over Faecbook puts a couple in jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E24 Messy Mascara
programme.desc: Tempers flare up when two agitated inmates share a cell. An intoxicated woman gives officers a hard time in booking, and a hustler facing DUI charges wants to change his ways.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 The Wild One
programme.desc: A woman is brought in for attacking her boyfriend. A talkative inmate is moved to isolation, and an daring inmate attempts to escape his restraints.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E19 Observers
programme.desc: Boisterous inmates are placed in restraints after initiating several verbal altercations. A woman struggles with substance abuse following the death of her fianc̩, and two young escorts discuss their "observing" strategy when casino hopping.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Handle with Care
programme.desc: Officers try to deal with a sloppy and combative drunk. A man gets locked up after he blows all his casino winnings, and a woman gets tricked by her bail bondsman.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Heart to Heart
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. A woman finds that trying to drink away a bad boyfriend and then asking the boyfriend for bail money is not a good idea. A man collapses during booking after being arrested for drunk driving. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Child of God
programme.desc: One man booked for intoxication is placed in a sobering cell for being uncooperative. An aggrieved woman claims Animal Control took her “baby.” A man tells officers he is a “child of God” and actor.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 2 Beers Too Many
programme.desc: A man arrested during a dangerous drug deal struggles to face jail time. Tempers flare when a man makes threats against the arresting officers. Marijuana falls out of a man’s pockets during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 Watch My Hair
programme.desc: A passenger allegedly attacked a cabdriver. A woman describes assaulting her boyfriend with hot food, and a mother is arrested for leaving her kids in a car while gambling.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E42 Exercise With Caution
programme.desc: An uncooperative inmate complicates things. A man charged with DUI complains about the prison food. A security guard arrested for robbery fears that her dream job with Homeland Security is gone.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E31 Biting Comments
programme.desc: An inmate becomes aggressive during a routine pat down. A confused senior citizen thinks the detention center is the site of a poetry slam, and two girlfriends come to blows while gambling.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E17 Toothless Tears
programme.desc: A transient man tries to resist the officers in booking then serenades them with a song. A difficult inmate blames his behavior on various medical conditions, and a woman claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E20 Stairway to Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. A correction officer tries to explain to a young man why carrying a gun-shaped knife is not a good idea. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Laws and Drawers
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a man is sent to a holding cell after hurling racial insults. In Reno, NV A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody for battery of a police officer. In Portland, OR an intoxicated eldery man breaks into song during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Pedaling Backwards
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Bad Boys
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E33 Little Big Man
programme.desc: A dominatrix is arrested for playing rough. A father is accused of assaulting his daughter's boyfriend, and an inmate's negative attitude leads to trouble.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 No Good Deed
programme.desc: A woman comes clean to having drugs hidden where they can’t be seen. An inmate’s exotic makeup is cleverly created with candy and toothpaste. A couple is surprised to find that holding someone against their will is a felony. Doing the right thing turns into an extended stay for a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 I'm Not Jane Doe
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a lewd woman is jailed. In Las Vegas, NV a man is placed in the restraining chair after attempting to bite his own fingers off. In Portland, OR a man is brought in for possession. In Sarasota, FL a homeless man is brought in for trespassing and battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E26 Pink Champagne
programme.desc: A man admits to urinating in public. A couple spends their date night in jail after being over served, and a DUI suspect passes out during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 LV NYE
programme.desc: We follow the men and women of LVMPD as they do their best to tame the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 Mas Tequila
programme.desc: Tequila is to blame when a man's behavior gets him locked up. A woman tries to sell drugs online. A detainee in holding for a DUI is of the opinion that he’s been jailed for driving too slow.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E21 Sleep Walker
programme.desc: A homeless man punches a singing transient over a racist comment. An assailant hits a sleeping man with a brick over a money dispute. A sobbing young man insists he was falsely arrested. A bar fight sends a UFC fighter to the hospital and the bartender who slugged him to jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Phone Fight
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Ultimate Fighter
programme.desc: An angry inmate refuses to change clothes. A man in violation of his parole is stopped by officers for attempting to hitchhike. Two men claim they were beaten by their girlfriends.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E05 Stripper Hygienist
programme.desc: A combative man is placed in a side cell. A transgender woman shares her story. A wild driver is placed in custody, and an intoxicated man is arrested for assault.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Chair Houdini
programme.desc: An intoxicated inmate escapes his restraints. A young woman denies she abused her mother, and a guard removes an inmate who is causing a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 Cousins
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Homeless Hospitality
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. In Spokane, WA a homeless man is brought in for assault. In Salt Lake City, UT a frequent visitor is brought in for threating the security staff at a local bar with a firearm.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Wanderer
programme.desc: Acts of aggression cause a man to be placed in a restraint chair. Jail lockdown occurs after an inmate is stabbed with a pencil. After being booked for road rage a woman unleashes a venomous tirade.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E23 Blondie and Clyde
programme.desc: A woman gives officers a hard time in booking when she refuses to comply. A catwoman is arrested for hitting her date at a club, and a pusherman discusses his contributions to the economy.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Fearless
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.desc: Officers outwit a man who refuses to give his name. A repeat DUI offender is jailed yet again. An intoxicated man is taken into custody and once the alcohol wears off he reveals that he’s broken his sobriety.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E20 Coopertive Cons
programme.desc: An intoxicated woman clashes with officers but later shows that good behavior pays off. An experienced prostitute gives solid advice to a younger woman and begs her to get out of the “game.” An angry woman smashes her cheating boyfriend’s windshield.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Pull It Together
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is sent to intake for indecent exposure. In Spokane, WA a man threatening bodily harm to himself is placed in a restraining chair. In Salt Lake City, UT an intoxicated woman fades in and out of coherency. In Portland, OR an amputee is detained for dodging the subway toll.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Homeless Hospitality
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. In Spokane, WA a homeless man is brought in for assault. In Salt Lake City, UT a frequent visitor is brought in for threating the security staff at a local bar with a firearm.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: An inmate demands that officers follow her instructions while in jail. A man insists that he has been kidnapped by the police and is being held illegally. An elderly man discovers that domestic violence does not have an age limit. A young woman makes the hard decision to turn herself in to change her life around.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Scrapping By
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV a man who insists he paid for a speeding ticket becomes so incensed that he is placed in a restraining chair. In Sarasota, FL a belligerent man accuses officers of touching him inappropriately. In Portland, OR officers help a young mother and her kids.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Teary Eyed Tagger
programme.desc: In Portland, OR an intoxicated male suspect is brought in for DUI. In Salt Lake City, UT a happy drunk woman is pleasantly cooperative. An emotional detainee sheds some tears while in isolation. In Las Vegas, NV a man is strapped in a restraining chair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E14 Band Brothers
programme.desc: A woman tries to conceal illegal substances in her bra. Bandmates are charged for tresspassing, and two inmates are separated and placed in restraints after losing control.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Heart to Heart
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. A woman finds that trying to drink away a bad boyfriend and then asking the boyfriend for bail money is not a good idea. A man collapses during booking after being arrested for drunk driving. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E06 School of Rock
programme.desc: A singer in custody performs for the officers. A woman is charged with burglary, and officers see right through a young woman's tears.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Meth Rage

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Fight For Your Right
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E39 Occupied By Psoriasis

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man’s trunk.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E35 Down-home Dog
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E29 Hard Ticket
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E14 Release & Catch
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an erratic driver while on the way to a shots fired call. An officer attempts to stop a resistant motorcyclist. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving an intoxicated man and a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E19 Runaway
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E16 Where There’s Smoke
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police spot a motel fire, alert the guests and contact the Fire Department. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E15 Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike then tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight about a road rage incident using rocks and a baseball bat. Suspects in a stopped car attempt to hide all the evidence against them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E25 Mailbox Baseball Playa
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells Officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E15 Graveyard Shiftiness
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E07 Allergy Season
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E22 And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E15 Find My Phone
programme.desc: A suspect fights back with his teeth during an arrest. A man tries to get revenge for his lost cell phone. A woman claims her neighbor slashed her tires for no reason.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E05 Better Safe Than Sorry
programme.desc: A deputy is forced to make a stunning choice when an armed man refuses to comply. A convicted felon tries everything to escape a trip to jail. Deputies respond when a car veers into oncoming traffic.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E10 Wake Up Call
programme.desc: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E09 What’s my name again?
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives Officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E26 Pub Rules
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes. A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E05 Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E20 A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E24 Dead End
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E17 Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won’t cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E21 Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting discovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E13 High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E05 Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E28 Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: A woman stuffs drugs into her under garments. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E32 Lamping
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E03 Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A suspicious driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a funny walking motorist is hiding something in his shoe.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E14 Misrepresented
programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse prostitution sting to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E10 Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A fleeing suspect takes officers on a wild chase through oncoming traffic. Surveillance footage of a stabbing helps police find the vicious attacker. Cops track a subject into an uncooperative stranger’s apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E20 A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
programme.desc: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E27 Drunk in Love
programme.desc: Hitching a ride home with the wrong guy almost lands one woman in the slammer. A known prostitute won’t be going on a second date. When a domestic partner refuses to leave home, officers intervene.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E17 Dark Tale
programme.desc: Officers assist an off-duty deputy being followed by a vehicle trying to force him off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her cheating husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E07 Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Officers make an arrest in connection to a string of robberies and recover discarded drugs and a gun in the process. An officer responds to a domestic dispute involving an intoxicated and hostile female. An officer checks in with a suspicious group of men in a high crime area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E36 Double Whammy
programme.desc: Officers engage in a vehicular pursuit involving a narcotics suspect. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving a mother, daughter and the mother’s new husband to be. An officer makes an arrest in a stolen SUV case.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E10 If You Hear Hooves
programme.desc: A woman needs police help when her boyfriend threatens her with a knife. A zebra runs loose on the streets of Sacramento County. A man wants to use a stick and a rock to settle a dispute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E12 Foolish Runner
programme.desc: Officers observe a man trying to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. Occupants of suspicious vehicles have outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E04 Drive Thru Blues
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer-involved fight. A brazen driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E18 Momma's Boy
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E08 Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E30 It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son’s girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E03 The Runaways
programme.desc: A chase ends when a driver-less vehicle goes headfirst into an apartment complex. A swift suspect can’t scamper fast enough to evade police. On routine patrol, officers stumble upon a 7-year-old boy who left home alone.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E32 Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A wanted man complains of chest pain after he injures a fellow driver. An angry woman calls the cops over a spicy bag of chips. A violent man finally learns where his girlfriend draws the line.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E16 We Run the Show
programme.desc: A stealthy robbery suspect leads officers on a chase through backyards. After dropping a bag of meth, a man swears he’s only seen the drug on TV. A doped-up domestic violence suspect tries to claim self-defense.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E31 When Ya Gotta Go

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E13 I Take This Criminal

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 That’s not Chapstick
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E34 Naked Chase
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by Police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E01 UC Drug Sting I

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops. A young couple tell deputies conflicting stories.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E09 Tree Hugging

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E28 Front Door Felony
programme.desc: Cops use cameras to track a suspected motorbike thief. A K-9 unit surveys a hilltop when officers suspect a man of wrongdoing. A concerned citizen steps in to stop a pair of would-be mail thieves.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E05 That’s My Grill
programme.desc: A teen makes a run for it after being turned over to medics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt can’t evict her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E19 Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight claims he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E06 Invisible Intruders

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E24 He's a Darter

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E30 Rock Star
programme.desc: An irate man has trouble accepting the truth. Officers question a cagey group in an effort to confirm their suspicions. An argument between Mom and Dad becomes violent, so the kids call the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E36 Don't Keep on Truckin
programme.desc: The occupants of a car with out-of-state plates try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known. An officer investigates a robbery at a truck stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E24 I’m With You Guys
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when Officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E33 Dare I Ask?
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E06 The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E15 A Weekly Thing
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E13 Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E12 The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car. A driver comes clean to a deputy during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E25 Dark Trailer Park
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E08 An Unfortunate Cycle
programme.desc: Officers arrange a sting to capture bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer stops a vehicle after witnessing a prostitute get inside.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E24 Not My Crack
programme.desc: An uncooperative suspect obeys instructions from his more levelheaded relative. A dead ringer for “The Rock” uncovers some crack rock. Officers try to get the truth out of two known drug users.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E16 Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to blame his actions on familial duty. A father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son. Officers discover some interesting items when they search a family man’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E12 Bail Me Out, Boss
programme.desc: Things go from bad to worse for one driver when his friend begins to talk. A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiancé́. Officers are befuddled when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E09 Dead End Dash
programme.desc: One suspect takes his chances in a ravine after he leads deputies to a dead end. A vehicle search turns a family outing into a trip to jail. The cops inspect a disturbance between a dad and his son.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E34 Fast Pase Foot Chase
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in foot chase and subsequent arrest. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence’s girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man’s house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E18 Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked. A woman asks for officers to help her rescue cats from a trailer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E25 Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E06 Life Changing Moment
programme.desc: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E17 Traffic Stop Interrupted
programme.desc: Officers respond to an assault call which escalates to car chase and the eventual arrest of two suspects. Officers spot a known drug dealer who uses a troubling method to conceal his narcotics. An officer curbs a heckler outside a popular bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E22 Turbo Charged
programme.desc: An extremely understanding cop gives a resistant suspect too many chances. A driver reminds us why we should never let a friend borrow our car. A man with a supped-up vehicle tells an awful lie to police.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E13 In The Ditch
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: Baby Shark's WHY Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Why does poop come out? Why do loose teeth fall out? Let's find out about our bodies with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Episode 4
programme.desc: "Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs."

programme.title: Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.desc: Wonder Star friends are sick! Join Hogi and Forest as they become doctors and heal their friends!

programme.title: Pinkfong Healthy Habits Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Stay healthy and happy every one! Kick-start your day with Pinkfong healthy habits song.

programme.title: Bebefinn Boo Boo Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Boo Boo Song
programme.desc: Ouch, ouch, it hurts! Help me! I was running and playing outside today! Ouch! I got hurt while running fast and sliding down the slide. Mommy, Daddy! Please make it better so it doesn’t hurt anymore!

programme.title: Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.desc: The Bebefinn family looks back on the year while flipping through their photo album. What fun things happened to the Bebefinn family this year? It was a happy year because everyone was together. Let’s fill the new year with even more sweet and happy moments with the Bebefinn family!

programme.title: Johny Johny, Yes Papa Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Sing the 'Johnny Johnny, Yes Papa' song while playing with Pinkfong and Ninimo! Let's rescue Ninimo, who got caught by the villain while secretly snacking!

programme.title: Pinkfong I Love My School
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong I Love My School
programme.desc: Let's express our love to friends, teachers, and everyone at the school! Show your affection to everyone who shares the school experience with us.

programme.title: Baby Shark Safety Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Learn all about safety with Baby Shark Safety Rangers with fun and educational Safety Songs Compilation.

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.title: Pinkfong Car Mechanic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the Pinkfong Repair Shop. Feel free to drop by!

programme.title: Pinkfong Super Rescue Team
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoi Poi Pinkfong! Pinkfong joins the Super Rescue Team! Join Pinkfong and the Super Rescue Team to solve all the cases happening in the city and learn essential safety tips along the way.

programme.title: Bebefinn Dance Time
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Dance Time
programme.desc: Have fun dancing and singing with Bebefinn! It's dance time with mom and dad, or with siblings!

programme.title: Pinkfong and Hogi Mini-Movie: The Tricky Three Cars
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 Pinkfong & Hogi Mini-Movie: The Tricky Three Cars
programme.desc: Join Hogi on a fun-filled adventure! When the Tricky Three Cars take Pinkfong and Wonderstar friends away, it's up to Hogi to save the day! Follow Hogi on a thrilling journey of courage and friendship. Can Hogi bring the friends back home safely?

programme.title: Super Hero Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Super Hero Baby Shark
programme.desc: Become a superhero and help Baby Shark and Daddy Shark defend the sea village! Use a variety of job tools to fight against the village villain, Thief Baby Shark. Will they be able to keep the peace in Sea Village?

programme.title: We Are Firefighters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Today, we’re firefighters! Join Firefighter Pinkfong and learn what firefighters do. Emergency call! Let’s go!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Easter Baby Shark and more
programme.desc: Happy Easter Everyone! You're watching "Easter Baby Shark and more", fun and educational Animal Songs presented by Pinkfong!

programme.title: Let's Booksplore with Hogi-Space
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Hogi visits the magical library, and is attracted to a mysterious book.. The adventure begins!

programme.title: Let's Booksplore with Hogi-Space
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: What happens in the library at night? Colorful books are flying all over there! Let's booksplore with Hogi.

programme.title: Pinkfong's Snack Time
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Friends sent a secret recipe to Little Chef Pinkfong! You can make any snack delicious Shall we learn how to make snacks with exciting songs and rhythms?

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Celebrate Birthdays with Pinkfong's Birthday Party Compilation

programme.title: Have You Seen My Siren
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: The siren is gone! Have you seen the police car's siren? Where did it go?

programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Episode 3

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Rick Astley's Hit Factory & Beyond
programme.desc: Rick's here, not just with Stock, Aitken & Waterman's big stars like Kylie and Jason, but with other massive 80s bangers that influenced the brilliant Hit Factory sound. Jump in!

programme.title: 80s Stars - But Who Is The Oldest?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 80s Stars - But Who Is The Oldest?
programme.desc: Yes, these pop and rock legends are now in their 70s & 80s, but still going strong. All were born in the 1940s, except one woman, born in 1939...but can you guess who?!

programme.title: Alternative 80s! with Wayne Hussey
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Alternative 80s! with Wayne Hussey
programme.desc: The Mission's gobby frontman with big, bold & ambitious 80s sounds that offered a true alternative to the ever present cheesy pop fare. From Joy Divison in 1980 to Electronic in 89

programme.title: Best Played at 45 RPM!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Best Played at 45 RPM!

programme.desc: 14 quickfire songs from the Nutty Boys of Camden Town - Madness! Including Baggy Trousers, Michael Caine & Wings of a Dove.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Two Tribes! Duran vs Spandau

programme.title: Gary Kemp's 25 Coolest Stars!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Gary Kemp's 25 Coolest Stars!
programme.desc: Spandau Ballet's songwriter picks his favourite stars, songwriters & cool icons that made the biggest impact in the 80s & beyond. Including Kate Bush, Elvis Costello & David Byrne.

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 So Awful, Yet So Amazing! Top 20

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Simon Bates Golden Hour: 1974

programme.title: The Best 1974 Party...Ever!

programme.title: American No.1s of 1974
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 American No.1s of 1974
programme.desc: In order - 15 videos that hit the top of the US chart in 1974. Some are obvious, but there are a few surprises along the way! Helen Reddy anyone?

programme.title: Hellraisers! Sweet vs Slade
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Hellraisers! Sweet vs Slade
programme.desc: 60 minutes of glorious Glam Rock from the godfathers of the genre - from London we have The Sweet, and from the sunny uplands of Wolverhampton it's Slade!

programme.desc: Experience the magic of 1974 & relive a year ablaze with excitement including groudbreaking music from Bay City Rollers, Abba, Mud & Elton John.

programme.desc: Experience the magic of 1974 & relive a year ablaze with excitement including groudbreaking music from Bay City Rollers, Abba, Mud & Elton John.

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1974
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The NOW Yearbook 1974

programme.title: All Day - It's 1974!

programme.desc: Experience the magic of 1974 & relive a year ablaze with excitement including groudbreaking music from Bay City Rollers, Abba, Mud & Elton John.

programme.desc: Relive the decade of perms and shoulder pads! The unmistakable synth pop sound of artists such as Michael Jackson, George Michael, and Whitney Houston, is bound to remind you of all your greatest '80s memories!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Long and the Short of It
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing meal featuring long and short ingredients! Josh makes a long sandwich, long grain rice, and a Long Island iced tea in a short glass, while Erica prepares long pepper short ribs, short grain rice, long beans, and long noodles!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Salmon Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Salmon is one of the few fish worthy of its own Cook Like a Chef episode; join Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to its many virtues…

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 Lamb Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong loves cooking lamb, and with his expert advice, you will too!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Game Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Game meats are on the menu for Chef Derek Dammann in this protein-packed episode of Cook Like a Chef.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Molise
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini highlights the tiny region of Molise, exposing some of its best kept savoury secrets. Starting with a classic, Michael cooks up a delicious multi-layered Chicory Timbale, a pie filled with fresh chicory, ripe roma tomatoes, and sliced prosciutto. To crisp up the top of the pie, Michael tops his delicious dish with finely grated pecorino cheese and crunchy breadcrumbs. Next up, Michael's primo is a spicy Octopus in Purgatory. This tender, colourful, and sumptuous dish is sure to impress in both looks and taste! For his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional Marinated Rabbit. Stewed in wine, tomatoes, and chilies, this rustic dish will have your guests asking for...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Valle D'Aosta
programme.desc: Delving into the cold mountainous region of Valle D'Aosta, Celebrity chef Michael Bonacini whips up a meal of four hearty dishes that are sure to warm up any chilly day. First up is Michael's antipasto of Wild Mushrooms and Lardo on Rye. Coated with rich, earthy mushrooms, buttery fontina cheese, and savoury cured pork, this decadent dish highlights a combination of iconic flavours from Valle D'Aosta. Next up is a twist on traditional pasta with Valle D'Aosta's unique Chestnut Fettucine topped with Sweet Pork and Earthy Cabbage. The secret to this dish? Chestnut flour to create a denser, sweeter, and nuttier pasta. For his secondo, Michael turns to the pride of the region, Fontina cheese,...

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Roast Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite meals – Roast Chicken Dinner! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Chicken Parmesan
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Chicken Parmesan! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Cold
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now. we're serving up 8 of our most popular recipes featuring honey. from hosts like Shahir Massoud and Jessica McGovern.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Weekday Rush
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a quick weekday meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: zucchini with balsamic and goat cheese, a rotini bake, and microwave lemon mug cakes!

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Caribbean Classics
programme.desc: Chef Dev shows off Caribbean street foods he grew up eating. including Pepper Shrimp from Jamaica. Saltfish and Bake from Guyana. and Doubles from Trinidad and Tobago.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Chili Chow
programme.desc: Chef Dev loves spicy food. so he’s making some of his favorite street food recipes that use chilis. including Hawawshi sandwiches from Egypt. Chicken 65 from India. and Street Corn from Mexico.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Pretty Shower Goodies
programme.desc: Make hosting your next shower a cinch with Jessica McGovern's simple and super cute recipes - like tiny Oatmeal Cookie Cheesecake Cups!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Long and the Short of It
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing meal featuring long and short ingredients! Josh makes a long sandwich, long grain rice, and a Long Island iced tea in a short glass, while Erica prepares long pepper short ribs, short grain rice, long beans, and long noodles!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Delicious Grilled Shellfish
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Sesame and Scallops
programme.desc: It's all about sesame and scallops in this letter "S" challenge, and host Theresa Visintin has some appetizing ideas up her sleeve. First, she shows us how to make scallop cassoulet, a simple recipe that can be cooked even faster than it can eaten! Theresa browns the tender scallops in delicious bacon fat and then bakes it on a bed of creamy kidney beans. Next, Theresa uses sesame seeds to create a zesty sauce for a take-out favourite, made in your very own kitchen - noodles! For her final recipe, our culinary host combines sesame and scallops, creating a juicy, crunchy masterpiece.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Weekday Rush
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a quick weekday meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: zucchini with balsamic and goat cheese, a rotini bake, and microwave lemon mug cakes!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Tea and Turkey
programme.desc: Tea and turkey are an unlikely combo for a meal, but Chef Robert Jewell is a creative force in the kitchen. First, he gives earl grey and lavender tea a sweet treatment by making a rich semifreddo. Robert creates a silky tea infused syrup, which he drizzles over a luxurious custard and tops with whipped cream. Robert punches up the colour by adding tart poached raspberries and vibrant violet lavender petals. Now, it's time for a real show stopper - saffron turkey kebabs with pomegranate rice. This is not your average turkey dinner. First, Robert marinates the turkey pieces in lime, yogourt and garlic. After infusing basmati rice with aromatic saffron and bay leaves, Robert tosses the rice...

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Erica Karbelnik
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next Erica Karbelnik as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Creamy
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on creamy sauces! First a duo of creamy butter sauces with salmon! Next up a sauce créme with beef tenderloin and a vegan coconut créme anglaise!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Savoury
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on savoury sauces! First up, a soy-miso-honey sauce for seared duck breast! Next, a black demi-glace for hanger steak and a sauce duxelles for scallops!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 Beef Tenderloin Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Beef Tenderloin is prized for its exceptional quality; Chef Katie Ardington is a talented teacher for showcasing its many virtues"...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E14 Dairy Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Chef-host Natalia Machado brings the dairy front and center in this episode; pulling back the curtain on a multitude of creamy creations"...

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Join Chef Craig Wong as he teaches us his tricks for building beautiful bowls full of broth and flavour in his celebration of soup.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E16 Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Alliums include staples like onions, garlic, leeks, and chives"... you'll love Chef Derek Dammann's skillful tips and tricks for using them all!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Puglia
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini explores its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favourite meals. First up, Michael's antipasto is a guaranteed crunchy bite with crispy Fried Mussels. Stepping away from the sea, Michael highlights Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes! Combining colourful tomatoes with flavourful burrata cheese, Michael cooks up comfort in a bowl with his Tomato and Burrata Risotto. Taking on a more festive flair, Michael introduces us to Little Pork Bombs, the hottest street food in Puglia. With a filling of fresh herbs and melted cheese, these pork skewers are savoury and irresistible. Then, Michael introduces...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Lazio
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food! To introduce us to Lazio, Host Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style Artichokes. As crunchy as a potato chip, Michael's artichokes are a delicious fried treat that are a perfect way to kick off a delicious meal. For his primo Michael brings together simple ingredients to create a rich Bucatini with Amatriciana Sauce. Michael's secondo turns what was once peasant food into a delectable and tender dish. Cooked with a blend of vegetables and sauce, Michael's Braised Oxtail brings forth the history of cuisine. Returning to Rome for his...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Campania
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Croatia + Barbados
programme.desc: CombiNATION time! Barbados is the sun-drenched island of enchantment where Chef Craig starts this culinary adventure. Check out Bajan Spice Snapper with Curried Pumpkin for a Caribbean taste sensation! Next comes a feast for the eyes with Oxtail PasÌŒticada from Croatia, served with a truffle sauce that melts in your mouth, and also in your heart! Turns out that both of these countries love... shrimp! Check out the Croatian creation with tomatoes and plum brandy; for Barbados? It's grilled with spice and dipped in mango-chili sauce. The Big Dish is Monkfish wrapped in PrsÌŒut, a smoky Croatian dry-cured ham, served with scotch bonnet-spiked tomatoes and Barbadian Cou cou made with corn...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Madagascar + Belgium
programme.desc: First up, Belgium is famous for its mussels and fries, aka 'Moule Frite'. Chef Wong has a unique take featuring Belgian beer steamed mussels salad, waffle cut fries, and potato-leek mousse. Next, Steak Madagascar is an old school fine-dining fave, this take, uses modernist 'spherification' for the sauce, and a vanilla bean rub for a steak that is decidedly not 'old school', wow! For a common ingredient, how about sweet breakfast? Belgians are famous for Liege Waffles, and Madagascar loves Mofogasy, a pancake made with rice flour and coconut. The final dish is inspired by Belgian Waterzooi, a root veggie stew, mixed with a popular Malagesy stir-fry with shellfish and pork... Chef carefully...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Peru + Lebanon
programme.desc: Tiraditos! No, it's not a joyous exclamation (even though it sounds a little like one...) it's a Peruvian dish that lands somewhere between traditional Peruvian ceviche and Japanese sashimi. Chef Craig Wong's version is made with swordfish and includes sweet potatoes pureed with spicy Aji Amarillo chilies. For his Lebanese tribute, check out Lamb Neck cured and slow-poached in olive oil for a melt-in- your-mouth result, paired with an intense, flavourful Black Baba Ghanoush made with charred eggplant and caramelized onions. For a common ingredient, it is two takes on potato: Lomo Saltado with grilled flank steak, and a cheese, herb, olive oil and lemon drenched Hasselback Batata Harra....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 South Africa + Portugal
programme.desc: This CombiNation Plates culinary adventure starts in Portugal with a Scallop dish that features some of their finest ingredients, such as Port Wine, ChouricÌ§o sausage, Kale, and Figs. Next up is South Africa and the feature is an Ostrich Steak, served with native Cape Gooseberries, the bizarrely named "Monkey Gland Sauce" (don't worry, no monkeys and very few glands are involved). The common ingredient is Peri Peri peppers, featured first on a Grilled Sardine with Olive Soil for a peak Portugal experience, then on the Peri Peri Chicken dish that South Africa made internationally famous. The combination plate is always the big finale... Stand back in awe for Chef Craig's Giant Braaied...

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Comfort Food
programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Delicious Grilled Shellfish
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled...

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Treat Yourself
programme.desc: Food nerd Desiree Nielsen knows how to add more veggies to our morning and shows us how it's done with a blueberry, celery, cucumber, and red cabbage juice.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Easy Comfort Food
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen cooks up a filling breakfast with spiralized fried potatoes with eggs and hollandaise.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Salty & Funky
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on salty, funky sauces! First up, a gorgonzola-prosciutto-orange wine pasta sauce! Next, a grape and olive tapenade to go with quail and sauce brandade for potatoes!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Madagascar + Belgium
programme.desc: First up, Belgium is famous for its mussels and fries, aka 'Moule Frite'. Chef Wong has a unique take featuring Belgian beer steamed mussels salad, waffle cut fries, and potato-leek mousse. Next, Steak Madagascar is an old school fine-dining fave, this take, uses modernist 'spherification' for the sauce, and a vanilla bean rub for a steak that is decidedly not 'old school', wow! For a common ingredient, how about sweet breakfast? Belgians are famous for Liege Waffles, and Madagascar loves Mofogasy, a pancake made with rice flour and coconut. The final dish is inspired by Belgian Waterzooi, a root veggie stew, mixed with a popular Malagesy stir-fry with shellfish and pork... Chef carefully...

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Long and the Short of It
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing meal featuring long and short ingredients! Josh makes a long sandwich, long grain rice, and a Long Island iced tea in a short glass, while Erica prepares long pepper short ribs, short grain rice, long beans, and long noodles!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Weekday Rush
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a quick weekday meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: zucchini with balsamic and goat cheese, a rotini bake, and microwave lemon mug cakes!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Rich and Delicious
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent - especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 Salad Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Salad is a wonderful addition to any meal, and sometimes even a meal on its own"... today, the talented Chef Craig Wong shares several of his superior salad ideas.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 Pork Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Snout to tail cooking is Chef Derek Dammann's specialty, in this episode celebrating pork, he cooks everything but the squeal!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Magic in the Middle
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a little surprise on the inside by baking up tasty filled goodies.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Cold
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now. we're serving up 8 of our most popular recipes featuring honey. from hosts like Shahir Massoud and Jessica McGovern.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 All About Eggs
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like CrÃ¨me Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Caribbean Classics
programme.desc: Chef Dev shows off Caribbean street foods he grew up eating. including Pepper Shrimp from Jamaica. Saltfish and Bake from Guyana. and Doubles from Trinidad and Tobago.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Chili Chow
programme.desc: Chef Dev loves spicy food. so he’s making some of his favorite street food recipes that use chilis. including Hawawshi sandwiches from Egypt. Chicken 65 from India. and Street Corn from Mexico.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Radicchio and Raisins
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin creates savoury meals in this letter "R" challenge featuring radicchios and raisins. First, Theresa chops up bold and bitter radicchios, grilling them until the edges are a crispy golden brown and perfect for a warm wedge salad. Then, she tosses fried pancetta and earthy portobello mushrooms in a luxurious champagne vinegar and pours it over the crispy radicchio. Theresa tops this warm salad with creamy crumbled goat's cheese. For her next dish, Theresa prepares a rum raisin sauce using golden sultana raisins, dark rum, and fresh orange. Theresa pours the sauce over succulent ham. Is your mouth watering yet? Finally, Theresa combines radicchio and raisin into a...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E20 Pork and Peanuts
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Sour
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on sour sauces! First a brown butter picatta sauce for chicken picatta! Next, a smoked tomato ponzu sauce for fried oysters and a duo of orange marmalade and lemon curd for crepes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Vegetable
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on veggie sauces! First up, a Provencal sauce tomate to go with halibut! Next, a rustic pepperonata with flank steak and a trio of pestos!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Salty & Funky
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on salty, funky sauces! First up, a gorgonzola-prosciutto-orange wine pasta sauce! Next, a grape and olive tapenade to go with quail and sauce brandade for potatoes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on sweet sauces! First up, a grown-up sundae with classic chocolate sauce! Next, a caramelized onion soubise for pork chops and a traditional sweet and sour chicken sauce!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Salmon Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Salmon is one of the few fish worthy of its own Cook Like a Chef episode; join Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to its many virtues…

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 Lamb Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong loves cooking lamb, and with his expert advice, you will too!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Game Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Game meats are on the menu for Chef Derek Dammann in this protein-packed episode of Cook Like a Chef.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Molise
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini highlights the tiny region of Molise, exposing some of its best kept savoury secrets. Starting with a classic, Michael cooks up a delicious multi-layered Chicory Timbale, a pie filled with fresh chicory, ripe roma tomatoes, and sliced prosciutto. To crisp up the top of the pie, Michael tops his delicious dish with finely grated pecorino cheese and crunchy breadcrumbs. Next up, Michael's primo is a spicy Octopus in Purgatory. This tender, colourful, and sumptuous dish is sure to impress in both looks and taste! For his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional Marinated Rabbit. Stewed in wine, tomatoes, and chilies, this rustic dish will have your guests asking for...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Valle D'Aosta
programme.desc: Delving into the cold mountainous region of Valle D'Aosta, Celebrity chef Michael Bonacini whips up a meal of four hearty dishes that are sure to warm up any chilly day. First up is Michael's antipasto of Wild Mushrooms and Lardo on Rye. Coated with rich, earthy mushrooms, buttery fontina cheese, and savoury cured pork, this decadent dish highlights a combination of iconic flavours from Valle D'Aosta. Next up is a twist on traditional pasta with Valle D'Aosta's unique Chestnut Fettucine topped with Sweet Pork and Earthy Cabbage. The secret to this dish? Chestnut flour to create a denser, sweeter, and nuttier pasta. For his secondo, Michael turns to the pride of the region, Fontina cheese,...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Tuscany
programme.desc: The popular region of Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights. Chef Michael Bonacini introduces us to Tuscany's fine cuisine with four of his favourite dishes. Michael draws attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture with an antipasto: Many Mushroom soup. Warm, hearty, and full of earthy flavour, Michael tops this soup with fried sage leaves to combine comfort and crunch in a single bite. For his primo, Michael explores a Tuscan favourite - Lamb Ragu! Served over pici noodles, Michael's rich ragu is complemented by fresh, light herbs. Then, Michael serves up a Porchetta-Style Duck, a crispy and tender secondo. To bring his meal together, Michael ends...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Veneto
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all. Host Michael Bonacini begins with the sea as he serves up an antipasto of succulent Soft Shell Crab. Michael pairs the crab with a Tangy Aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy. Moving inland for his primo, Michael twists together two classic Venetian dishes to make a new favourite: Radicchio Risotto! With his secondo, Michael cooks up a light and creamy Pancetta-Wrapper Snapper with Pea Mash. Sweet and tender, this dish will melt in your mouth. Whether you're in the mood to share or feeling a little selfish, Michael's Giant Almond Crumb Biscuit covers it...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 France + Vietnam
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 USA + India
programme.desc: Go-to Indian menu item Lamb Rogan Josh is one thing, but Lamb Sweetbreads Rogan Josh with Aloo Gobi Foam? That's a CombiNATION Plates thing! Craig Wong is at it again in this USA + India episode. After India, Chef moves on to the USA to answer the question, 'is everything better battered and fried?' with his Country Fried Torchon of Foie Gras. The common ingredient for these two distant nations is lobster, and really, who doesn't love it? For the US, it's Lobster with Cajun Spice Grits and Pickled Okra, and for India, check out Lobster Curry with Coconut Milk. The finale features Catfish like you've never seen it. Cooked Tandoori style and served with Collard Greens Paneer and Peach...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Iceland + Jamaica
programme.desc: Halibut is on the menu for Craig Wong's first stop in this episode of CombiNATION Plates for his Icelandic tribute, the firm, flaky fish is served with Lovage, BeÌarnaise, and Beet Glazed Turnips. Next, it's a Jamaican adventure on a plate featuring whole, soft-shell crab Escovitch, fried, doused in chili vinegar, and served with carrot meringue?! Check out the common ingredient: ice cream! With creamy Skyr style with Blueberries representing Iceland and an Avocado Lime sensation for Jamaica that only Chef Wong could pull off, made in mere moments with liquid nitrogen! The Big Dish is a you-could-only-find-it-here experience; Jamaican Jerk Spice Reindeer (yes, you read that right) served...
